name: Snowflake Inc.
summary: Snowflake Inc. delivers the AI Data Cloud, a cloud-based platform enabling organizations to consolidate data into a single source of truth, apply AI to solve business problems, build data applications, and share data securely. Its platform features independently scalable storage, compute, and cloud services layers, supporting structured, semi-structured, and unstructured data. Snowflake operates on a consumption-based business model and runs on public cloud infrastructure, requiring near-zero infrastructure maintenance for customers.

origin.chain: SEC.gov PEM → origin.rootz.global extraction → GitHub mirror
